tools.name: top_whales
tools.description: Current whale activity across DeFi: top boosted tokens, community takeovers, CoinGecko trending. Filter by chain.

tools.name: flow_scan
tools.description: Protocol TVL flow analysis: current TVL, 7-day inflow/outflow, chain breakdown. Track where capital is moving.

tools.name: institutional
tools.description: Track institutional-grade protocols: Lido, Aave, Maker, Ondo, BlackRock, Ethena etc. TVL, 1d/7d changes, categories.

tools.name: alpha_signal
tools.description: Combined alpha scoring: price momentum + volume surge + buy pressure + whale boost activity. Rating: COLD to EXPLOSIVE.

tools.name: protocol_flows
tools.description: Top protocols gaining and losing TVL right now. The smart money flow radar. Filter by category (DEX, Lending, etc.).

tools.name: chain_flows
tools.description: Cross-chain capital allocation: which chains hold how much TVL. See where the ecosystem money sits.

tools.name: stablecoin_flows
tools.description: Stablecoin supply tracking — a leading market indicator. Total supply, per-coin breakdown, chain distribution.

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Server health, API connectivity, tool list, pricing.
